extracted_concepts.name: Derivative
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: The derivative of a function f at a number a is the limit of difference quotients

extracted_concepts.name: Limit
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: The value a function approaches as the input approaches a given value

extracted_concepts.name: Tangent
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: The line that touches a curve at a point with the same instantaneous direction

extracted_concepts.name: Function
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: A relation that assigns each input exactly one output

extracted_concepts.name: Velocity
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: The limit of average velocities over shrinking time intervals

extracted_relations.evidence: Derivative is defined as a limit of the difference quotient
The derivative gives the slope of the tangent line
Instantaneous velocity is defined as a limit of average velocities
The derivative of position function gives velocity
